name: ave-types
description: TypeScript types for the Averiun Ledger API

scripts.release:patch: bash generate.sh && npm version patch && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:minor: bash generate.sh && npm version minor && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:major: bash generate.sh && npm version major && npm publish --access public
